name: employee-management-payroll
description: Full-stack MERN Employee Management & Payroll System — HR dashboard, attendance, leave management, payroll, performance reviews, reports, and role-based access.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
